name: MVillage
description: Rebuilt core booking, membership, loyalty, and payment journeys while helping establish the engineering team behind them.
contributions: Supported analytics foundations and acquisition initiatives designed to improve customer growth, retention, and the end-to-end hospitality experience.
resumeContributions: Helped establish the engineering team and rebuild booking, membership, loyalty, and operational platforms with React and Next.js.
Delivered the booking journey from room selection through OnePay redirect and return handling, integrating OnePay, TPBank, and OCB for online bookings and membership purchases.
Implemented Amplitude, GA4, and GTM foundations for product analytics, attribution, and acquisition campaigns.

name: Prophet Exchange
description: Owned business-critical frontend systems across payments, customer lifecycle, analytics, and engagement for web and mobile.
contributions: Delivered deposit and withdrawal flows, analytics integrations, and lifecycle marketing capabilities that supported acquisition, engagement, and retention.
resumeContributions: Built and maintained customer-facing sportsbook and prediction-market experiences, including registration, user profile, betting flows, wager status, and bet matching status.
Implemented real-time wager and bet status updates using Pusher, improving visibility across betting and matching workflows.
Supported deposit, withdrawal, payment provider integrations, and Martech systems using PayPal, Trustly, WorldPay, PayNearMe, Segment, AppsFlyer, Mixpanel, Braze, and Customer.io.

name: CQ & Capitalis
description: Turned AI-enabled investment concepts into scalable product experiences, prototypes, and MVPs.
contributions: Partnered across Product, Design, and Backend, contributed to Stripe payment workflows, and used AI-assisted engineering practices to accelerate delivery.
resumeContributions: Built scalable product features, prototypes, and MVPs from requirements, stakeholder feedback, and design concepts.
Delivered React and Next.js applications while contributing to Node.js APIs and Stripe workflows when required.
Collaborated across Product, Design, and Backend throughout delivery, using AI-assisted workflows to accelerate prototyping, debugging, code review, and releases.
